name: Honey Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Add honey, orange juice, butter, and vanilla; mix well.
4. Stir into dry ingredients just until moistened.
5. Fill 12 greased muffin cups about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until golden.
Makes: 12 muffins
